scripts.preview: nuxt build && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.db:deploy:turso: sqlite3 ../processamento/database/olho-regional.db 'PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL;' && turso db destroy olho-regional -y && turso db create olho-regional --from-file ../processamento/database/olho-regional.db --location aws-eu-west-1 && turso db tokens create olho-regional | wrangler pages secret put TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN --project-name olho-regional
scripts.db:stats: sqlite3 ../processamento/database/olho-regional.db "SELECT 'Total rows: ' || sum(cnt) FROM (SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM noticias UNION ALL SELECT count(*) FROM jornais UNION ALL SELECT count(*) FROM noticias_labels UNION ALL SELECT count(*) FROM noticias_entities UNION ALL SELECT count(*) FROM quotes UNION ALL SELECT count(*) FROM labels UNION ALL SELECT count(*) FROM entities UNION ALL SELECT count(*) FROM distritos UNION ALL SELECT count(*) FROM municipios UNION ALL SELECT count(*) FROM jornais_distritos UNION ALL SELECT count(*) FROM jornais_municipios);"
